Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Kaihu Electric (Legacy).

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanping Kaihu Electric Co., Ltd. is a defunct 1990s micro-workshop suffering from an extreme registry misclassification. Officially tagged as an 'Automobile Body and Trailer Manufacturer', its true origins (extracted from 'industry_medium') reveal it was founded in 1992 as 'Nanping Huaguang Automotive Electronic Appliance Factory'. Its extracted business scope shows a highly disjointed product line ranging from 'auto parts' and 'generator sets' to household appliances like 'exhaust hoods and ventilation fans'. With a microscopic capital of just 500,000 RMB and a corrected workforce of exactly 1 insured employee (2024), it is physically impossible for this entity to manufacture trailers or even basic electrical appliances today. It is entirely defunct, existing only as a 1-person legacy paper shell in Nanping's Yanping District.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 79)
Operational Status: DORMANT FACTORY / MICRO SHELL
